name: Ashveil
desc: He takes cases on a whim, cracks them with hard-core logic, and solves the strangest crimes on sheer instinct.\nWith a monkey for an assistant and his heart set on retirement, the detective sleeps in a refrigerator, waiting for the bait to catch its willing prey.\nUnder the light of the Phantasmoon, the vile beast howls. How will he draw the net on this hunt?

1.name: Beware: Venture Not at Full Moon
1.desc: While Ashveil is on the field, increases DMG taken by all enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an enemy target's current HP percentage is <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> or lower, the DMG they take increases to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Knock: Where Snickers Echo
2.desc: The max stack limit of "Gluttony" increases to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. After each time Ashveil launches the enhanced Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, refunds <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the removed "Gluttony" stacks.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

3.name: Hush: Unsaid Between Friends
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Heed: Swallow Truth Whole
4.desc: When Ashveil uses Ultimate, increases ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Caution: Sleuth Turns Slayer
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Finale: And Then There Were None
6.desc: When the "Bait" exists on the field, reduces all enemies' All-Type RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. For every 1 stack of "Gluttony" Ashveil has gained, the DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).

150401.name: Talons: Inculcate Decorum
150401.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK to one designated enemy.
150401.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one designated enemy.

150402.name: Flog: Smite Evil
150402.desc: Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing it Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK. If the target is already the "Bait," additionally deals it Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK, and recovers <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s). When the "Bait" exists on the field, all enemies' DEF gets reduced by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nWhen there is no "Bait" on the field, Ashveil immediately makes the enemy target with the lowest HP on the field become the "Bait." The "Bait" state only takes effect on the most recently applied target.
150402.simple_desc: Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing massive Lightning DMG to them. If the target is already the "Bait," additionally deals minor Lightning DMG to them, and recovers <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> Skill Point(s). When the "Bait" exists on the field, all enemies' <color=#f29e38ff>DEF gets reduced</color>.

150403.name: Banquet: Insatiable Appetite
150403.desc: Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing it Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK. Then, immediately launches 1 instance of enhanced Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against the "Bait." And Ashveil gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge.\nThis enhanced Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> does not consume Charge. Whenever "Gluttony" reaches <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s) or more, consumes <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Gluttony" to additionally deal 1 instance of Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK. And when this instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> deals a killing blow to the target, it will continue to deal DMG to a new "Bait." This triggers until "Gluttony" becomes lower than <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s). If all enemy targets currently on the field have been dealt killing blows, the enhanced Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> will immediately end.
150403.simple_desc: Makes one designated enemy become the "Bait," dealing massive Lightning DMG to them. Then, <color=#f29e38ff>immediately launches against the "Bait"</color> 1 instance of enhanced Talent's <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>. And Ashveil gains Charge.\nThis enhanced Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> does not consume Charge. Whenever "Gluttony" reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) or more, consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Gluttony" to additionally deal massive Lightning DMG. And when this instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> deals a killing blow to the target, it will <color=#f29e38ff>continue to deal DMG to a new "Bait"</color>. This triggers until "Gluttony" becomes lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

150404.name: Rancor: Enmity Reprisal
150404.desc: Ashveil has an initial Charge of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and can hold up to a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. After the "Bait" gets attacked by other ally targets, Ashveil regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> Energy, then consumes <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Charge to launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against the "Bait," dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ashveil's ATK. Afterwards, gains <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Gluttony," which can stack up to <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>.
150404.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>After the "Bait" gets attacked by other ally targets</color>, Ashveil regenerates a fixed amount of Energy, then consumes Charge to <color=#f29e38ff>launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> against the "Bait," dealing massive Lightning DMG. Afterwards, gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Gluttony."

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

150406.name: Talons: Inculcate Decorum
150406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150407.name: Devour: O Loathsome Hand
150407.desc: After using Technique, inflicts Daze on enemies within a set area for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Dazed enemies will not actively attack ally targets.\nWhen entering combat via actively attacking a Dazed enemy, deals Lightning DMG to all enemies equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Ashveil's ATK, and grants Ashveil <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Charge.
150407.simple_desc: Inflicts Daze on enemies within a set area. After entering combat via attacking a Dazed enemy, deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies, and grants Ashveil <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> Charge.

1.point_desc: When Ashveil uses Skill/Ultimate, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stacks of "Gluttony." During Ashveil's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, for every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> enemy(ies) that suffer a killing blow, Ashveil gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Gluttony."

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: DMG dealt by Ashveil's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. And for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Gluttony" in possession, DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK additionally increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: While Ashveil is on the field, CRIT DMG dealt by ally targets increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and CRIT DMG dealt by ally target's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
